productDisplayName: Fila Men Glam Black Casual Shoes
description: Arty with sporty graffiti, this fila Glam shoe is a great buy. With a comfortable fabric upper and grippy outsole, it's a perfect buy for those who never compromise in comfort and style.UpperCanvas upper for easy maintenance, breathability and durability Arty print for styleCarbon rubber toe box with PU foxing for enhanced protection to the forefoot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug FitLace-ups through metal eyelets for snug fit and durability MidsolePaded fabric footbed made for absolute cushioning and all-day in-step comfortOutsoleVulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Pivot point on the big toe mound along horizontal flex grooves and has fila brand name-styled lugs all over the outsole for absolute gripShoe care Make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
